behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the test function, file path (libs/npm/resolution/snapshot.rs), lockfile key format (@myorg/shared@1.0.0_zod@4.3.6), and dist: None/Some(...) assertions.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the symptom (raw key includes suffix, lookup fails) but doesn't prescribe the exact fix like using PackageNv or &id.nv.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for absence of buggy patterns and behavioral correctness; regex allows multiple valid fixes (&id.nv, key_base, etc.).

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute cargo test, cargo check, clippy, and run the unit test that exercises snapshot_from_lockfile.

test_not_tautological.reason: The unit test asserts dist: None for linked and dist: Some for non-linked; a stub wouldn't pass without implementing the fix.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Required unit test name, dist assertions, and compilation are all tested.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section headers (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass) and clearly named.

no_typos.reason: Paths and names appear correct and consistent.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Points to the relevant file/function as localization guidance but doesn't name the exact buggy line.
